_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of dynamic and deliberate targeting.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-005 (AB, cosine: 0.430), RM-S-008 (RM, cosine: 0.422).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.520). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [deliberate, dynamic, targeting] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.902, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.060 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of dynamic and deliberate targeting." and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.471 ≈ STS 0.520 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [deliberate, dynamic, targeting]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples].
